programme.desc: S01 E15 Little Charo is an animation series about a Japanese dog who got lost in NY. I want to see my owner again! Charo starts his adventure back home.
programme.title: Little Charo

programme.desc: Eyeglasses Peter Barakan explores the world of eyeglasses in Sabae, Fukui, the manufacturing hub responsible for over 90% of Japan's glasses.
programme.title: Japanology Plus Mini

programme.desc: Miyazaki: Flowers, Archery, and a Festival A cat takes a nap among the fragrant flowers at a farm that grows sweet pea flowers; another cat takes a nap at an archery range! We meet more local cats as residents celebrate a unique tradition.
programme.title: A Cat's-Eye View of Japan

programme.desc: Japan's disaster relief; Asia news; business and global current events.
programme.title: NHK Newsline

programme.desc: Into the Future, Together The host visits southern Taiwan to meet energetic local families, from farmers growing unique vegetables to a family that raises dragon tiger groupers.
programme.title: CYCLE AROUND TAIWAN

programme.desc: What Is an Ordinary Papa? Mee and an expedition team set out to find what makes a Papa ordinary.
programme.title: I Love 'Mee'

programme.desc: Dimensions special As different colors, blue and yellow can make green by getting together, similarly different lives can coexist by helping each other. This is a program to develop the mind of living together.
programme.title: Design Ah! neo

programme.desc: Japan's disaster relief; Asia news; business and global current events.
programme.title: NHK Newsline

programme.desc: Passy The host travels to various cities around the world to explore tourist attractions and monuments and speaks to the local people there.
programme.title: Somewhere Street

programme.desc: Hirosaki Park The filmmaker explores the multifaceted beauty of sakura blossoms at Hirosaki Park in Aomori Prefecture.
programme.title: Time-Lapse Journey

programme.desc: Daisen-Oki Daisen-Oki National Park comprises the Oki Islands, which boast spectacular geological formations, and a mainland area with shrines and sacred mountains that gave rise to myths and legends.
programme.title: National Parks of Japan

programme.desc: Japan's disaster relief; Asia news; business and global current events.
programme.title: NHK Newsline

programme.desc: Yamaguchi The filmmakers embark on a journey through Japan by car, visiting a range of the country's destinations and learning about locals' delicacies.
programme.title: Hit the Road

programme.desc: Furniture Restoration: Giving Life to Treasured Heirlooms A look at a professional furniture restorer who runs a cleaning service that restores family treasures to their former glory.
programme.title: Core Kyoto Mini

programme.desc: Asking Others for Favours Foreigners learn useful Japanese workplace expressions, explore business cultures and improve kanji proficiency.
programme.title: Easy Japanese for Work

programme.desc: No Stone Wasted Inagaki Ryota runs a stone carving business with his partner, stone artisan Inoue Koji. They use stone castoffs to make beautiful tableware that also helps keep food at the optimal temperature.
programme.title: Zero Waste Life

programme.desc: Japan's disaster relief; Asia news; business and global current events.
programme.title: NHK Newsline

programme.desc: A Japanese Holdout in Indonesia Mario investigates the life of his grandfather, who continued fighting after the end of World War II, and why he decided to stay in Indonesia.
programme.title: My Grandfather's Story

A goofy astronaut (Don Knotts) with a fear of heights becomes assistant janitor, then goes on a space mission.
programme.title: The Reluctant Astronaut

programme.desc: Two broke jazzmen (Bing Crosby, Bob Hope) hop a southbound ship and save a hypnotized heiress (Dorothy Lamour) from her sinister aunt.
programme.title: Road to Rio

programme.desc: A retired cat burglar (Cary Grant) sees fireworks with an American heiress (Grace Kelly) on the Riviera.
programme.title: To Catch a Thief

programme.desc: After returning to Hawaii from being in the army, a pineapple tycoon's rebellious son turns into an island tour guide with his girlfriend.
programme.title: Blue Hawaii

programme.desc: Rebel trucker "Rubber Duck" (Kris Kristofferson) blocks a crooked sheriff (Ernest Borgnine) with a CB-linked army of big rigs.
programme.title: Convoy

programme.desc: The pirate (Robert Newton) and young Jim Hawkins (Kit Taylor) rescue Purity Pinker (Connie Gilchrist) and look for treasure.
programme.title: Long John Silver

programme.desc: Willie (Anne Baxter), a German woman, joins an American carnival passing through Munich. While traveling town to town, she joins Frank in his high-dive act, but tragedy is only a slip away.
programme.title: Carnival Story

programme.desc: Defeated in battle and angry at his wife (Sylvia Lopez), the B.C. ruler (Edmund Purdom) of Judea goes roaring mad.
programme.title: Herod the Great

programme.desc: A psychiatrist (Vincent Price) and a nurse (Lynn Bari) treat a veteran's (Frank Latimore) wife who has seen them kill the psychiatrist's wife.
programme.title: Shock

programme.desc: An unpopular captain (Gregory Peck) leads his cavalry troops to a mountain pass, to hold it against Apaches.
programme.title: Only the Valiant

programme.desc: A Scotland Yard inspector (Byron Palmer) follows an actress (Constance Smith) to her fellow lodger, Jack the Ripper (Jack Palance).
programme.title: Man in the Attic

programme.desc: A barmaid, a Bostonian and an Indian (Rita Gam) flirt with an artist (Scott Brady) in 18th-century upstate New York.
programme.title: Mohawk

programme.desc: Newlyweds (Lucille Ball, Desi Arnaz) splurge on a trailer for their honeymoon, which includes Yosemite National Park.
programme.title: The Long, Long Trailer

programme.desc: Irish sheep herders (Deborah Kerr, Robert Mitchum) roam with their son and helper (Peter Ustinov), making a living in the 1920s Australia.
programme.title: The Sundowners

programme.desc: Gorilla general Aldo (Claude Akins) hounds ape leader Caesar (Roddy McDowall) and what's left of humanity on simian-ruled future Earth.
programme.title: Battle for the Planet of the Apes

programme.desc: Corrupted by a lord (George Sanders), Oscar Wilde's London aristocrat (Hurd Hatfield) stays young, but his portrait begins to age.
programme.title: The Picture of Dorian Gray

programme.desc: Sitting in a wheelchair, his leg in a cast, a photographer (James Stewart) spies on courtyard neighbors and sees a murder.
programme.title: Rear Window

programme.desc: A dancing princess (Rita Hayworth) loves a Roman commander (Stewart Granger) and inspires King Herod (Charles Laughton) to have John the Baptist beheaded.
programme.title: Salome

programme.desc: The sled dog Buck helps a roughneck (Charlton Heston) and his partner to cover a lot of territory in Alaska.
programme.title: Call of the Wild

programme.desc: A hit man (Frank Sinatra) and company plan to shoot the president when he gets off his train in Suddenly, Calif.
programme.title: Suddenly

programme.desc: In a Nazi prison barracks, other POWs believe that a cynical American sergeant (William Holden) is an informer.
programme.title: Stalag 17

programme.desc: Dagwood (Arthur Lake) fights a cold and enters a songwriting contest with Blondie (Penny Singleton) after the couple accidentally gave more money to charity than they can afford.
programme.title: Leave It to Blondie

programme.desc: A spy and the FBI hunt a petty thief (Richard Widmark) who has lifted microfilm from a woman's (Jean Peters) purse.
programme.title: Pickup on South Street

programme.desc: Hopalong Cassidy stops Joe Weiler from instigating a prairie war between two ranchers.
programme.title: In Old Colorado

programme.desc: Moe, Larry and Curly Joe circle the globe with Phileas Fogg III and his girlfriend.
programme.title: The Three Stooges Go Around the World in a Daze

programme.desc: Gentle Dr. Jekyll (Spencer Tracy) tests a serum on himself, releasing vicious alter-ego Mr. Hyde on 19th-century London. Prowling the town, Hyde ventures to a music hall and encounters Ivy (Ingrid Bergman), whom he takes forcibly as his mistress.
programme.title: Dr. Jekyll and Mr. Hyde

programme.desc: Doc Holliday (Kirk Douglas) joins Wyatt Earp (Burt Lancaster) and his brothers for a Tombstone showdown with the Clanton gang.
programme.title: Gunfight at the O.K. Corral

programme.desc: Oscar-winning adaptation of the Broadway hit about an English professor (Rex Harrison) who teaches a cockney merchant (Audrey Hepburn) to be a lady.
programme.title: My Fair Lady

programme.desc: S01 E18 — Lucy and Viv Put in a Shower Lucy decides that the time has come to install another shower.
programme.title: The Lucy Show

programme.desc: Lovers quarrel around surfers, Don Rickles, Buster Keaton, Von Zipper's biker gang.
programme.title: Beach Blanket Bingo

programme.desc: New York playgirl Holly Golightly puzzles a writer who lives in her building.
programme.title: Breakfast at Tiffany's

programme.desc: When scientists suspect that an alien force is attacking Earth, they send two spaceships to weaken the enemy.
programme.title: Battle in Outer Space

programme.desc: Masked Man (Clayton Moore) and Tonto (Jay Silverheels) learn why hooded riders have been killing Indians and stealing medallions.
programme.title: The Lone Ranger and the Lost City of Gold

programme.desc: The story of the heroic English nurse who was executed by a German firing squad for aiding refugees during World War I.
programme.title: Nurse Edith Cavell

programme.desc: Slapstick comedy from Larry, Moe, Curly and occasionally Shemp.
programme.title: The Three Stooges

programme.desc: S01 E12 — Hand on the Gun A tenderfoot with pretensions of being a quick-draw expert rides into Dave's camp.
programme.title: The Westerner

programme.desc: The Briefcase Story Steve must uncover who is trying to sabotage a meeting in Paris between representatives from the United States and three Eastern European countries.
programme.title: Dangerous Assignment

programme.desc: S02 E11 — Touch Off Mike investigates an arson ring.
programme.title: Man With a Camera

programme.desc: S01 E21 — The Spy International spies hide microfilm in Dagwood's hat, and now they want it back.
programme.title: Blondie

programme.title: The Lucy Show
